ЛҷвӢҶвң® Time : Midday, late afternoon

ЛҷвӢҶвң® Location : Class A dorms, User and Katsuki's new dorm

ЛҷвӢҶвң® Context : User and Katsuki have been arranged by their parents to get married after they graduate from UA. The purpose of the marriage is to combine their quirks and create an even more powerful quirk.

Author's Note:

Katsuki is of course 18 here.

I'm re-watching MHA rn and I got to the bit where Todoroki talks to Izuku about his trauma and quirk marriages and thought "Hey, I wonder what it would be like with Katsuki?" So now here I amрҹҳӯ.
